    movsd xmm3,             xmm0
    subsd xmm3,             xmm1
    movsd real8 ptr[eax+8], xmm3

    movsd xmm4,              xmm0
    mulsd xmm4,              xmm1
    movsd real8 ptr[eax+16], xmm4

    movsd xmm5,              xmm0
    divsd xmm5,              xmm1
    movsd real8 ptr[eax+24], xmm5

    movsd xmm6,              xmm0
    minsd xmm6,              xmm1
    movsd real8 ptr[eax+32], xmm6

    movsd xmm7,              xmm0
    maxsd xmm7,              xmm1
    movsd real8 ptr[eax+40], xmm7

    ; abs(xmm1)
    andpd xmm1,              [AbsMaskDouble]
    movsd real8 ptr[eax+48], xmm1

    ; sqrt(xmm1)
    sqrtsd xmm0,              xmm1
    movsd  real8 ptr[eax+56], xmm0

    pop ebp
    ret

SSEArithmeticOpDouble endp

end

    面积和体积

    计算球面积和体积。首先给出 C 程序

    #include <iostream>

extern "C" bool SSESphereCalc(double r, double *s, double *v);

int main() {
  double r = 10.0;
  double s, v;

  SSESphereCalc(r, &s, &v);
  std::cout << "Sphere radius: " << r << std::endl;
  std::cout << "Sphere surface area: " << s << std::endl;
  std::cout << "Sphere volume: " << v << std::endl;

  return 0;
}

    由于不使用堆栈，因此可以直接计算保存

    .386
.MMX
.XMM

.model        flat, c
option        casemap:none

.const

r8_pi         real8 3.14159265358979
r8_four       real8 4.0
r8_three      real8 3.0
r8_neg_one    real8 -1.0

.code

SSESphereCalc proc
    push ebp
    mov  ebp, esp

    ; xmm0 = r
    movsd xmm0, real8 ptr[ebp+8]

    ; ecx = s, edx = v
    mov ecx, [ebp+16]
    mov edx, [ebp+20]

    xorpd  xmm7, xmm7 ; xmm7 = 0.0
    comisd xmm0, xmm7 ; 比较 xmm0 和 0.0
    jle    BadRadius  ; 如果 xmm0 小于 0.0，则跳转到 BadRadius

    movsd xmm1,           xmm0
    mulsd xmm1,           xmm1      ; xmm1 = r^2
    mulsd xmm1,           [r8_four] ; xmm1 = 4.0 * r^2
    mulsd xmm1,           [r8_pi]   ; xmm1 = 4.0 * r^2 * pi
    movsd real8 ptr[ecx], xmm1      ; s = 4.0 * r^2 * pi

    mulsd xmm1,           xmm0       ; xmm1 = 4.0 * r^3 * pi
    divsd xmm1,           [r8_three] ; xmm1 = 4.0 * r^3 * pi / 3.0
    movsd real8 ptr[edx], xmm1       ; v = 4.0 * r^3 * pi / 3.0

    mov eax, 1

    pop ebp
    ret

BadRadius:
    movsd xmm0,           [r8_neg_one] ; xmm0 = -1.0
    movsd real8 ptr[ecx], xmm0         ; s = -1.0
    movsd real8 ptr[edx], xmm0         ; v = -1.0

    pop ebp
    ret

SSESphereCalc endp

end

    多数据运算

    实现多数据单指令运算。首先给出 C 程序

    #include <iostream>

#include "MmxVal.h"

extern "C" void SSEPackedInt16_Add(const XmmVal *a, const XmmVal *b,
                                   XmmVal c[2]);
extern "C" void SSEPackedInt32_Sub(const XmmVal *a, const XmmVal *b, XmmVal *c);
extern "C" void SSEPackedInt32_Mul(const XmmVal *a, const XmmVal *b,
                                   XmmVal c[2]);

void SSEPackedInt16_Add_Test();
void SSEPackedInt32_Sub_Test();
void SSEPackedInt32_Mul_Test();

int main() {
  SSEPackedInt16_Add_Test();
  SSEPackedInt32_Sub_Test();
  SSEPackedInt32_Mul_Test();
  return 0;
}

void SSEPackedInt16_Add_Test() {
  // 对齐 16 字节
  __declspec(align(16)) XmmVal a;
  __declspec(align(16)) XmmVal b;
  __declspec(align(16)) XmmVal c[2];
  char buff[255];

  a.i16[0] = 120, b.i16[0] = 90;
  a.i16[1] = 20, b.i16[1] = 820;
  a.i16[2] = -3000000, b.i16[2] = 70;
  a.i16[3] = -400, b.i16[3] = -650;
  a.i16[4] = 5021, b.i16[4] = -50;
  a.i16[5] = 620, b.i16[5] = 140;
  a.i16[6] = -70, b.i16[6] = 30;
  a.i16[7] = 80, b.i16[7] = -210;

  SSEPackedInt16_Add(&a, &b, c);

  printf("\nResult for SSEPackedInt16_Add:\n");
  printf("a: %s\n", a.ToString_i16(buff, sizeof(buff)));
  printf("b: %s\n", b.ToString_i16(buff, sizeof(buff)));
  printf("c0: %s\n", c[0].ToString_i16(buff, sizeof(buff)));
  printf("c1: %s\n", c[1].ToString_i16(buff, sizeof(buff)));
  printf("\n");
}

void SSEPackedInt32_Sub_Test() {
  // 对齐 16 字节
  __declspec(align(16)) XmmVal a;
  __declspec(align(16)) XmmVal b;
  __declspec(align(16)) XmmVal c;
  char buff[255];

  a.i32[0] = 120, b.i32[0] = 90;
  a.i32[1] = 20, b.i32[1] = 820;
  a.i32[2] = -3000, b.i32[2] = 70;
  a.i32[3] = -40, b.i32[3] = -650;

  SSEPackedInt32_Sub(&a, &b, &c);

  printf("\nResult for SSEPackedInt32_Sub:\n");
  printf("a: %s\n", a.ToString_i32(buff, sizeof(buff)));
  printf("b: %s\n", b.ToString_i32(buff, sizeof(buff)));
  printf("c: %s\n", c.ToString_i32(buff, sizeof(buff)));
  printf("\n");
}

void SSEPackedInt32_Mul_Test() {
  // 对齐 16 字节
  __declspec(align(16)) XmmVal a;
  __declspec(align(16)) XmmVal b;
  __declspec(align(16)) XmmVal c[2];
  char buff[255];

  a.i32[0] = 120, b.i32[0] = 90;
  a.i32[1] = 20, b.i32[1] = 820;
  a.i32[2] = -3000, b.i32[2] = 70;
  a.i32[3] = -40, b.i32[3] = -650;

  SSEPackedInt32_Mul(&a, &b, c);

  printf("\nResult for SSEPackedInt32_Mul:\n");
  printf("a: %s\n", a.ToString_i32(buff, sizeof(buff)));
  printf("b: %s\n", b.ToString_i32(buff, sizeof(buff)));
  printf("c0: %s\n", c[0].ToString_i32(buff, sizeof(buff)));
  printf("c1: %s\n", c[1].ToString_i64(buff, sizeof(buff)));
  printf("\n");
}

    然后实现对应的汇编代码

    .386
.MMX
.XMM

.model             flat, c
option             casemap:none

.code

SSEPackedInt16_Add proc
    push ebp
    mov  ebp, esp

    ; eax = a, ecx = b, edx = c
    mov eax, [ebp+8]
    mov ecx, [ebp+12]
    mov edx, [ebp+16]

    ; 复制 16 字节对齐的数据
    movdqa xmm0, [eax] ; xmm0 = a
    movdqa xmm1, xmm0
    movdqa xmm2, [ecx] ; xmm2 = b

    paddw  xmm0, xmm2 ; xmm0 = a + b, wrapping around
    paddsw xmm1, xmm2 ; xmm1 = (a + b) + ((a + b) >> 16), saturating

    ; 保存数据
    movdqa [edx],    xmm0
    movdqa [edx+16], xmm1

    pop ebp
    ret

SSEPackedInt16_Add endp

SSEPackedInt32_Sub proc
    push ebp
    mov  ebp, esp

    ; eax = a, ecx = b, edx = c
    mov eax, [ebp+8]
    mov ecx, [ebp+12]
    mov edx, [ebp+16]

    ; 复制 16 字节对齐的数据
    movdqa xmm0, [eax] ; xmm0 = a
    psubd  xmm0, [ecx] ; xmm0 = a - b

    ; movdqu 不需要对齐
    movdqu [edx], xmm0 ; c = a - b

    pop ebp
    ret

SSEPackedInt32_Sub endp

SSEPackedInt32_Mul proc
    push ebp
    mov  ebp, esp

    ; eax = a, ecx = b, edx = c
    mov eax, [ebp+8]
    mov ecx, [ebp+12]
    mov edx, [ebp+16]

    ; 复制 16 字节对齐的数据
    movdqa xmm0, [eax] ; xmm0 = a
    movdqa xmm1, [ecx] ; xmm1 = b
    movdqa xmm2, xmm0  ; xmm2 = a

    pmulld xmm0, xmm1 ; 每个 32 位 dword 相乘，保存低 32 位
    pmuldq xmm2, xmm1 ; 每个 32 位 dword 相乘，保存 64 位

    movdqa [edx],    xmm0
    movdqa [edx+16], xmm2

    pop ebp
    ret

SSEPackedInt32_Mul endp

end

    movdqa 要求操作数必须是 16 字节对齐，否则会报错；如果不确定是否对齐，使用 movdqu 替代。

    编译运行得到

    Result for SSEPackedInt16_Add:
a:      120       20    14656     -400     5021      620      -70       80
b:       90      820       70     -650      -50      140       30     -210
c0:      210      840    14726    -1050     4971      760      -40     -130
c1:      210      840    14726    -1050     4971      760      -40     -130

Result for SSEPackedInt32_Sub:
a:          120           20        -3000          -40
b:           90          820           70         -650
c:           30         -800        -3070          610

Result for SSEPackedInt32_Mul:
a:          120           20        -3000          -40
b:           90          820           70         -650
c0:        10800        16400      -210000        26000
c1:            10800          -210000

    注意 paddw, paddsw 分别对应环绕算术和截断算术，因此加法可能会有溢出导致的不同结果；pmulld, pmuldq 都计算 32 位 dword 乘法，但是前者保存结果的低 32 位，后者保留全部 64 位。于是

    xmm0 = [a3, a2, a1, a0]
xmm1 = [b3, b2, b1, b0]

pmulld xmm0, xmm1 -> [l33, l22, l11, l00]
pmuldq xmm0, xmm1 -> [a3 * b3, a1 * b1]

    其中前者得到 4 个 32 位 dword，后者得到 2 个 qword 。

    AVX

    内存结构

    为了模拟 AVX 内存，首先给出自定义结构

    union YmmVal {
  Int8 i8[32];   // 32 * 8-bit integer
  Int16 i16[16]; // 16 * 16-bit integer
  Int32 i32[8];  // 8 * 32-bit integer
  Int64 i64[4];  // 4 * 64-bit integer

  Uint8 u8[32];   // 32 * 8-bit unsigned integer
  Uint16 u16[16]; // 16 * 16-bit unsigned integer
  Uint32 u32[8];  // 8 * 32-bit unsigned integer
  Uint64 u64[4];  // 4 * 64-bit unsigned integer

  float r32[8];
  double r64[4];

  char *ToString_i16(char *s, size_t len);
  char *ToString_i32(char *s, size_t len);
  char *ToString_i64(char *s, size_t len);

  char *ToString_u16(char *s, size_t len);
  char *ToString_u32(char *s, size_t len);
  char *ToString_u64(char *s, size_t len);

  char *ToString_r32(char *s, size_t len);
  char *ToString_r64(char *s, size_t len);

  char *ToString_x16(char *s, size_t len);
  char *ToString_x32(char *s, size_t len);
  char *ToString_x64(char *s, size_t len);
};

    然后实现将 union 中的数据转换为字符串输出的方法

    char *YmmVal::ToString_i16(char *s, size_t len) {
  sprintf_s(
      s, len, "%8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d",
      i16[0], i16[1], i16[2], i16[3], i16[4], i16[5], i16[6], i16[7], i16[8],
      i16[9], i16[10], i16[11], i16[12], i16[13], i16[14], i16[15]);
  return s;
}

char *YmmVal::ToString_i32(char *s, size_t len) {
  sprintf_s(s, len, "%12d %12d %12d %12d %12d %12d %12d %12d", i32[0], i32[1],
            i32[2], i32[3], i32[4], i32[5], i32[6], i32[7]);
  return s;
}

char *YmmVal::ToString_i64(char *s, size_t len) {
  sprintf_s(s, len, "%16lld %16lld %16lld %16lld", i64[0], i64[1], i64[2],
            i64[3]);
  return s;
}

char *YmmVal::ToString_u16(char *s, size_t len) {
  sprintf_s(
      s, len, "%8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d %8d",
      u16[0], u16[1], u16[2], u16[3], u16[4], u16[5], u16[6], u16[7], u16[8],
      u16[9], u16[10], u16[11], u16[12], u16[13], u16[14], u16[15]);
  return s;
}

char *YmmVal::ToString_u32(char *s, size_t len) {
  sprintf_s(s, len, "%12d %12d %12d %12d %12d %12d %12d %12d", u32[0], u32[1],
            u32[2], u32[3], u32[4], u32[5], u32[6], u32[7]);
  return s;
}

char *YmmVal::ToString_u64(char *s, size_t len) {
  sprintf_s(s, len, "%16llu %16llu %16llu %16llu", u64[0], u64[1], u64[2],
            u64[3]);
  return s;
}

char *YmmVal::ToString_r32(char *s, size_t len) {
  sprintf_s(s, len, "%12f %12f %12f %12f %12f %12f %12f %12f", r32[0], r32[1],
            r32[2], r32[3], r32[4], r32[5], r32[6], r32[7]);
  return s;
}

char *YmmVal::ToString_r64(char *s, size_t len) {
  sprintf_s(s, len, "%16f %16f %16f %16f", r64[0], r64[1], r64[2], r64[3]);
  return s;
}

char *YmmVal::ToString_x16(char *s, size_t len) {
  sprintf_s(s, len,
            "%04X %04X %04X %04X %04X %04X %04X %04X %04X %04X %04X %04X %04X "
            "%04X %04X %04X",
            u16[0], u16[1], u16[2], u16[3], u16[4], u16[5], u16[6], u16[7],
            u16[8], u16[9], u16[10], u16[11], u16[12], u16[13], u16[14],
            u16[15]);
  return s;
}

char *YmmVal::ToString_x32(char *s, size_t len) {
  sprintf_s(s, len, "%08X %08X %08X %08X %08X %08X %08X %08X", u32[0], u32[1],
            u32[2], u32[3], u32[4], u32[5], u32[6], u32[7]);
  return s;
}

char *YmmVal::ToString_x64(char *s, size_t len) {
  sprintf_s(s, len, "%016llX %016llX %016llX %016llX", u64[0], u64[1], u64[2],
            u64[3]);
  return s;
}

    算术指令

    验证 AVX 算术指令。首先给出 C 程序

    #include <iostream>

extern "C" void AVX_fpArith(double a, double b, double results[8]);

int main() {
  const char *names[8] = {"vaddsd", "vsubsd", "vmulsd",    "vdivsd",
                          "vminsd", "vmaxsd", "vsqrtsd a", "fabs b"};

  double a = 13.90;
  double b = -2.34;
  double results[8];
  AVX_fpArith(a, b, results);
  printf("\nResult from Computation:\n");
  printf("a = %.2f, b = %.2f\n", a, b);
  for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
    printf("%s = %.2f\n", names[i], results[i]);
  }
  return 0;
}

    相应的汇编代码

    .386
.MMX
.XMM

.model      flat,                    c
option      casemap:none

.const

AbsMask     qword 7fffffffffffffffh, 7fffffffffffffffh

.code

AVX_fpArith proc
    push ebp
    mov  ebp, esp

    mov    eax,  [ebp+24]
    vmovsd xmm0, real8 ptr[ebp+8]  ; xmm0 = a
    vmovsd xmm1, real8 ptr[ebp+16] ; xmm1 = b

    vaddsd xmm2, xmm0, xmm1        ; xmm2 = a + b
    vsubsd xmm3, xmm0, xmm1        ; xmm3 = a - b
    vmulsd xmm4, xmm0, xmm1        ; xmm4 = a * b
    vdivsd xmm5, xmm0, xmm1        ; xmm5 = a / b

    vmovsd real8 ptr[eax],    xmm2
    vmovsd real8 ptr[eax+8],  xmm3
    vmovsd real8 ptr[eax+16], xmm4
    vmovsd real8 ptr[eax+24], xmm5

    vminsd xmm2, xmm0, xmm1
    vmaxsd xmm3, xmm0, xmm1
    vsqrtsd xmm4, xmm0, xmm0

    ; abs(b) xmmword 表示 128 字节数据块
    vandpd xmm5, xmm1, xmmword ptr[AbsMask]

    vmovsd real8 ptr[eax+32], xmm2
    vmovsd real8 ptr[eax+40], xmm3
    vmovsd real8 ptr[eax+48], xmm4
    vmovsd real8 ptr[eax+56], xmm5

    pop ebp
    ret

AVX_fpArith endp

end

    多数据运算

    实现多数据单指令运算。首先给出 C 程序

    #include <iostream>

#include "MmxVal.h"

extern "C" void AVXPackedInt16(YmmVal *a, YmmVal *b, YmmVal c[6]);
extern "C" void AVXPackedInt32(YmmVal *a, YmmVal *b, YmmVal c[5]);

void AVXPackedInt16_Test();
void AVXPackedInt32_Test();

int main() {
  AVXPackedInt16_Test();
  AVXPackedInt32_Test();
  return 0;
}

void AVXPackedInt16_Test() {
  __declspec(align(32)) YmmVal a;
  __declspec(align(32)) YmmVal b;
  __declspec(align(32)) YmmVal c[6];

  a.i16[0] = -30, b.i16[0] = 40;
  a.i16[1] = 50, b.i16[1] = 60;
  a.i16[2] = 70, b.i16[2] = -80;
  a.i16[3] = 90, b.i16[3] = 100;
  a.i16[4] = -110, b.i16[4] = 120;
  a.i16[5] = 130, b.i16[5] = -140;
  a.i16[6] = -150, b.i16[6] = 160;
  a.i16[7] = 170, b.i16[7] = 180;
  a.i16[8] = -190, b.i16[8] = -200;
  a.i16[9] = 210, b.i16[9] = 220;
  a.i16[10] = 230, b.i16[10] = -240;
  a.i16[11] = 250, b.i16[11] = -260;
  a.i16[12] = -270, b.i16[12] = 280;
  a.i16[13] = 290, b.i16[13] = 300;
  a.i16[14] = -310, b.i16[14] = -320;
  a.i16[15] = 330, b.i16[15] = 340;

  char buff[255];
  AVXPackedInt16(&a, &b, c);
  printf("\nResult of AVXPackedInt16:\n");
  printf("a: %s\n", a.ToString_i16(buff, sizeof(buff)));
  printf("b: %s\n", b.ToString_i16(buff, sizeof(buff)));

  for (int i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
    printf("c[%d]: %s\n", i, c[i].ToString_i16(buff, sizeof(buff)));
  }
}

void AVXPackedInt32_Test() {
  __declspec(align(32)) YmmVal a;
  __declspec(align(32)) YmmVal b;
  __declspec(align(32)) YmmVal c[5];

  a.i32[0] = -300, b.i32[0] = 4;
  a.i32[1] = 500, b.i32[1] = 6;
  a.i32[2] = 70000, b.i32[2] = -8;
  a.i32[3] = 90, b.i32[3] = 1;
  a.i32[4] = -1100, b.i32[4] = 12;
  a.i32[5] = 13000, b.i32[5] = -14;
  a.i32[6] = -15000, b.i32[6] = 10;
  a.i32[7] = 17000, b.i32[7] = 18;

  char buff[255];
  AVXPackedInt32(&a, &b, c);
  printf("\nResult of AVXPackedInt32:\n");
  printf("a: %s\n", a.ToString_i32(buff, sizeof(buff)));
  printf("b: %s\n", b.ToString_i32(buff, sizeof(buff)));

  for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
    printf("c[%d]: %s\n", i, c[i].ToString_i32(buff, sizeof(buff)));
  }
}

    测试汇编程序

    .386
.MMX
.XMM

.model         flat, c
option         casemap:none

.code

AVXPackedInt16 proc
    push ebp
    mov  ebp, esp

    mov eax, [ebp+8]
    mov ecx, [ebp+12]
    mov edx, [ebp+16]

    ; 对于 ymm0 要求 32 字节对齐
    ; 对于 xmm0 要求 16 字节对齐
    vmovdqa ymm0, ymmword ptr [eax]
    vmovdqa ymm1, ymmword ptr [ecx]

    vpaddw ymm2, ymm0, ymm1  ; ymm2 = ymm0 + ymm1
    vpaddsw ymm3, ymm0, ymm1 ; ymm3 = ymm0 + ymm1 (signed)

    vpsubw ymm4, ymm0, ymm1  ; ymm4 = ymm0 - ymm1
    vpsubsw ymm5, ymm0, ymm1 ; ymm5 = ymm0 - ymm1 (signed)

    vpminsw ymm6, ymm0, ymm1 ; ymm6 = min(ymm3, ymm5)
    vpmaxsw ymm7, ymm0, ymm1 ; ymm7 = max(ymm3, ymm5)

    vmovdqa ymmword ptr [edx],     ymm2
    vmovdqa ymmword ptr [edx+32],  ymm3
    vmovdqa ymmword ptr [edx+64],  ymm4
    vmovdqa ymmword ptr [edx+96],  ymm5
    vmovdqa ymmword ptr [edx+128], ymm6
    vmovdqa ymmword ptr [edx+160], ymm7

    ; 清空 YMM 寄存器
    vzeroupper

    pop ebp
    ret

AVXPackedInt16 endp

AVXPackedInt32 proc
    push ebp
    mov  ebp, esp

    mov eax, [ebp+8]
    mov ecx, [ebp+12]
    mov edx, [ebp+16]

    vmovdqa ymm0, ymmword ptr [eax]
    vmovdqa ymm1, ymmword ptr [ecx]

    vphaddd ymm2, ymm0, ymm1    ; 水平加法
    vphsubd ymm3, ymm0, ymm1    ; 水平减法
    vpmulld ymm4, ymm0, ymm1    ; 符号乘法
    vpsllvd ymm5, ymm0, ymm1    ; shift left
    vpsravd ymm6, ymm0, ymm1    ; shift right

    vmovdqa ymmword ptr [edx],     ymm2
    vmovdqa ymmword ptr [edx+32],  ymm3
    vmovdqa ymmword ptr [edx+64],  ymm4
    vmovdqa ymmword ptr [edx+96],  ymm5
    vmovdqa ymmword ptr [edx+128], ymm6

    ; 清空 YMM 寄存器
    vzeroupper

    pop ebp
    ret

AVXPackedInt32 endp

end

    在混合使用 AVX、SSE 和 MMX 指令时 vzeroupper 清零 YMM 寄存器的上半部分（高 128 位），从而减少在 AVX 和 SSE 指令切换时的性能损耗。这个指令是为了优化混合使用 SIMD 指令集的程序，确保处理器更高效地处理指令转换。

    其中 vphaddd, vphsubd 执行水平加减法，例如

    xmm1 = [A7, A6, A5, A4, A3, A2, A1, A0] 
xmm2 = [B7, B6, B5, B4, B3, B2, B1, B0] 

vphaddw xmm1, xmm1, xmm2 
xmm1 = [(A7+A6), (A5+A4), (A3+A2), (A1+A0), (B7+B6), (B5+B4), (B3+B2), (B1+B0)]

    这里 vphaddw 对相邻的 16 位整数做加法，而 vphaddd 对相邻的 32 位整数做加法。

    Made with Material for MkDocs
